title: Diplazium wattsii
taxonomy: Diplazium wattsii is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It belongs to the genus Diplazium, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the 'wood ferns'. Diplazium wattsii is also classified as a member of the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta, which are the ferns and fern allies. The species is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plant species. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf structure and reproductive habits.
